verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You may be surprised at what we can accomplish with Jesus on our side there's nothing that can stop us when we're walking hand in hand with life and truth there's nothing in our way you may be surprised but it's just another day with Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What is that in your hand? What is that in your hand? He can do the impossible through you if you will take a stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We've seen Him use a stone. We've seen him use a rod. We've seen Him use a bone, 2 fish and 5 loaves, even a cattle prod.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What is that in your hand? What is that in your hand? He can do the impossible through you if you will take a stand.
